# SOURCE: Profit Fix Formula (PFF)

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Created:** 2026-03-24
> **Last Updated:** 2026-03-24
> **Program:** Profit Fix Formula
> **Authors:** Stefan Georgi (primary), Justin Goff (upsell methodology — OLAF Method)
> **Type:** Self-paced course (24 modules, checklist + breakdown format)
> **Source ID:** SG-PROFIT-FIX-FORMULA
> **Status:** COMPLETE

---

## OVERVIEW

```
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                                                                              ║
║   PROFIT FIX FORMULA — Stefan Georgi (with Justin Goff)                      ║
║                                                                              ║
║   A tactical, checklist-driven course for diagnosing and fixing              ║
║   underperforming funnels. Unlike RMBC (which teaches copy creation          ║
║   from scratch), PFF is a REPAIR MANUAL — designed for existing              ║
║   funnels that aren't converting.                                            ║
║                                                                              ║
║   Each section delivers: Master Checklist + Type Breakdowns +                ║
║   Real-World Examples (Blissy, Cacao Bliss, 1TAC, Paleovalley,              ║
║   GS85, Sell Like Crazy).                                                    ║
║                                                                              ║
║   24 modules | 162 files | ~80 DNA elements extracted                        ║
║                                                                              ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

## MODULE BREAKDOWN

### Course Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  PROFIT FIX FORMULA — 24 MODULES                                            │
│  ═══════════════════════════════                                             │
│                                                                             │
│  APPROACH: Each funnel element gets a CHECKLIST (master diagnostic)         │
│  followed by TYPE BREAKDOWNS (specific variations) and REAL-WORLD           │
│  EXAMPLES showing the principles in action on actual funnels.               │
│                                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  SECTION 1: LANDING PAGES (Modules 1-6)                                     │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 1: LANDING PAGE MASTER CHECKLIST                                    │
│  └── Comprehensive diagnostic for any landing page                         │
│  └── Above-fold audit (headline, subhead, hero, CTA)                       │
│  └── Body audit (proof, benefits, mechanism, objections)                    │
│  └── Close audit (offer, guarantee, urgency, CTA)                          │
│  └── Technical audit (speed, mobile, tracking)                             │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 2: VSL LANDING PAGE BREAKDOWN                                       │
│  └── Video sales letter page optimization                                  │
│  └── Video placement, thumbnail, autoplay decisions                        │
│  └── Below-video content strategy                                          │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 3: LONG-FORM SALES LETTER BREAKDOWN                                │
│  └── Traditional long-form page optimization                               │
│  └── Scroll depth optimization                                             │
│  └── Section-by-section conversion analysis                                │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 4: ADVERTORIAL LANDING PAGE BREAKDOWN                               │
│  └── Native/editorial-style page optimization                              │
│  └── Bridge page architecture                                              │
│  └── Presell-to-sale transition optimization                               │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 5: E-COMMERCE / PDP BREAKDOWN                                       │
│  └── Product detail page optimization                                      │
│  └── Image gallery, reviews, FAQ, trust elements                           │
│  └── Add-to-cart optimization                                              │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 6: LEAD MAGNET / OPT-IN BREAKDOWN                                   │
│  └── Opt-in page conversion optimization                                   │
│  └── Value proposition in 3 seconds                                        │
│  └── Form optimization, privacy copy                                       │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  SECTION 2: CHECKOUTS (Modules 7-10)                                        │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 7: CHECKOUT MASTER CHECKLIST                                        │
│  └── Cart abandonment diagnostic                                           │
│  └── Trust element audit                                                   │
│  └── Micro-copy optimization                                               │
│  └── Payment option analysis                                               │
│  └── Progress indicator effectiveness                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 8: SINGLE-STEP CHECKOUT BREAKDOWN                                   │
│  └── One-page checkout optimization                                        │
│  └── Order bump placement and copy                                         │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 9: MULTI-STEP CHECKOUT BREAKDOWN                                    │
│  └── Multi-page funnel checkout optimization                               │
│  └── Step-by-step commitment ladder                                        │
│  └── Information capture sequencing                                        │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 10: SUBSCRIPTION/RECURRING CHECKOUT BREAKDOWN                       │
│  └── Subscription-specific checkout optimization                           │
│  └── Commitment language, trial offers, cancellation friction              │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  SECTION 3: UPSELLS — OLAF METHOD (Modules 11-13)                          │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 11: UPSELL MASTER CHECKLIST (OLAF METHOD)                           │
│  └── Justin Goff's OLAF (One-Line Acceptance Formula) applied              │
│  └── Upsell conversion diagnostic                                         │
│  └── Timing, relevance, price-point analysis                               │
│  └── Decline-to-downsell flow optimization                                 │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 12: POST-PURCHASE UPSELL BREAKDOWN                                  │
│  └── Immediately post-purchase upsell optimization                         │
│  └── Complementary product/upgrade architecture                            │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 13: DOWNSELL + ORDER BUMP BREAKDOWN                                 │
│  └── Downsell sequence optimization                                        │
│  └── Order bump copy and placement                                         │
│  └── Price anchoring through upsell/downsell cascade                       │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  SECTION 4: FACEBOOK ADS (Modules 14-18)                                    │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 14: FACEBOOK ADS MASTER CHECKLIST                                   │
│  └── Ad performance diagnostic                                             │
│  └── Creative audit (image, video, copy, CTA)                              │
│  └── Targeting audit                                                       │
│  └── Landing page congruence check                                         │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 15: IMAGE AD BREAKDOWN                                              │
│  └── Static image ad optimization                                          │
│  └── Visual hierarchy, text overlay, emotional triggers                    │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 16: VIDEO AD BREAKDOWN                                              │
│  └── Video ad hook, retention, CTA optimization                            │
│  └── First 3 seconds, pattern interrupts, sound-off design                 │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 17: CAROUSEL AD BREAKDOWN                                           │
│  └── Multi-card storytelling optimization                                  │
│  └── Card sequence, mini-narrative architecture                            │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 18: NATIVE/ADVERTORIAL AD BREAKDOWN                                 │
│  └── Editorial-style ad optimization                                       │
│  └── Ad-to-advertorial congruence                                          │
│  └── Compliance-safe patterns                                              │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  SECTION 5: EMAIL MARKETING (Modules 19-24)                                 │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 19: 6 POWER EMAILS — OVERVIEW                                       │
│  └── Stefan's 6 essential email types that drive revenue                   │
│  └── Each email type has a specific job in the sequence                    │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 20: POWER EMAIL 1 — THE STORY EMAIL                                 │
│  └── Narrative-driven email that builds connection                         │
│  └── Hook → story → bridge → CTA structure                                 │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 21: POWER EMAIL 2 — THE PROOF EMAIL                                 │
│  └── Testimonial/case study email that builds credibility                  │
│  └── Before → transformation → mechanism → CTA                             │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 22: POWER EMAIL 3 — THE OBJECTION-KILLER EMAIL                      │
│  └── Pre-empts and dissolves the #1 buying objection                       │
│  └── Acknowledge → reframe → prove wrong → CTA                            │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 23: POWER EMAIL 4 — THE URGENCY EMAIL                               │
│  └── Creates legitimate time pressure                                      │
│  └── Scarcity → consequence of inaction → CTA                              │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 24: POWER EMAILS 5 & 6 — CURIOSITY + DIRECT OFFER                  │
│  └── Open-loop curiosity email + direct "here's the deal" email            │
│  └── Sequence placement strategy for maximum impact                        │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRACTED

### Tier 1: Core Systems

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  PROFIT FIX FORMULA — 5-Section Funnel Diagnostic                           │
│  ════════════════════════════════════════════════                            │
│                                                                             │
│  SECTION 1: LANDING PAGES                                                   │
│  └── Master Checklist + 5 type-specific breakdowns                         │
│  └── Types: VSL, Long-form, Advertorial, E-commerce, Lead Magnet           │
│                                                                             │
│  SECTION 2: CHECKOUTS                                                       │
│  └── Master Checklist + 3 type-specific breakdowns                         │
│  └── Types: Single-step, Multi-step, Subscription                          │
│                                                                             │
│  SECTION 3: UPSELLS (OLAF Method by Justin Goff)                           │
│  └── Master Checklist + 2 type-specific breakdowns                         │
│  └── Types: Post-purchase upsell, Downsell + Order bump                    │
│                                                                             │
│  SECTION 4: FACEBOOK ADS                                                    │
│  └── Master Checklist + 4 type-specific breakdowns                         │
│  └── Types: Image, Video, Carousel, Native/Advertorial                     │
│                                                                             │
│  SECTION 5: EMAIL MARKETING                                                 │
│  └── 6 Power Emails with individual breakdowns                             │
│  └── Types: Story, Proof, Objection-Killer, Urgency, Curiosity, Direct     │
│                                                                             │
│  TOTAL: 5 master checklists + 20 type-specific breakdowns                  │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  6 POWER EMAILS — Revenue-Driving Email System                              │
│  ═════════════════════════════════════════════                               │
│                                                                             │
│  Each email type serves a specific function in the sales sequence:          │
│                                                                             │
│  1. STORY EMAIL        → Build connection, establish relatability           │
│  2. PROOF EMAIL        → Build credibility, showcase transformation        │
│  3. OBJECTION-KILLER   → Remove buying barriers                            │
│  4. URGENCY EMAIL      → Create time pressure                              │
│  5. CURIOSITY EMAIL    → Open loops, drive clicks                          │
│  6. DIRECT OFFER EMAIL → Straight pitch, no games                          │
│                                                                             │
│  SEQUENCE: Deploy in this order for maximum impact.                        │
│  Each builds on the previous. Story → Proof → Objection → Urgency          │
│  → Curiosity → Direct.                                                     │
│                                                                             │
│  "6 emails, done right, can replace a 30-email autoresponder."             │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Tier 2: Tactical Frameworks

| Framework | Section | Description |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| Landing Page Master Checklist | 1 | Above-fold + body + close + technical audit |
| Checkout Master Checklist | 2 | Trust elements, micro-copy, payment options, progress indicators |
| OLAF Method (Justin Goff) | 3 | One-Line Acceptance Formula for upsell conversion |
| Facebook Ads Master Checklist | 4 | Creative + targeting + congruence audit |
| Upsell/Downsell Cascade | 3 | Price anchoring through upsell → downsell → order bump sequence |
| Ad-to-Page Congruence Check | 4 | Message match verification between ad creative and landing page |

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  REAL-WORLD FUNNEL BREAKDOWNS                                               │

│                                                                             │

│                                                                             │

│                                                                             │
│  SELL LIKE CRAZY (Sabri Suby)                                               │
│  └── Lead magnet → book funnel → high-ticket upsell analysis               │
│  └── Multi-step value ladder case study                                    │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

| Layer | Count | Key Elements |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| L1 — Philosophies | 10 | Funnel-as-system, diagnose-before-fix, checklist-driven-optimization, data-over-opinion |

| L3 — Heuristics | 25 | Conversion benchmarks per page type, checkout abandonment thresholds, upsell conversion targets, email open rate benchmarks, ad CTR thresholds |
